title: hieracium sudeticum subsp. bohemicum
intro: Hieracium sudeticum subsp. bohemicum, also known as Bohemian hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Central Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Bohemian hawkweed is known for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
